Research Use Only

Peptipura

peptipura.net  ·  Brief Date: June 2026  ·  Revision: 1.0
US-Based · San Francisco Founder-Operated Free USPS Priority Shipping Bilingual — EN / ES formerly Bridge Research Rank 5 · Tier 2 · 8.1 / 10
Protokol X Trust Score
Rank 5 · Tier 2 · 8.1 / 10. Founder-operated boutique profile with Bridge Research heritage, open COA access, and high accountability signals.
8.1
/ 10
BLUF — Bottom Line Up Front

This assessment evaluates publicly available evidence, documentation, verification architecture, operational transparency, and community signals for Peptipura. Peptipura is a founder-operated US vendor — run by Angela, based in San Francisco — built explicitly around the quality gaps she experienced as a researcher sourcing peptides in the market. The brand represents a rebrand of the former Bridge Research operation, providing meaningful operational history beyond the Peptipura domain registration date. Documentation posture is strong for a boutique operation: publicly accessible Lab Results page, third-party testing stated across the catalog, clean RUO compliance language, and a full policy suite. Operational heritage combined with founder transparency and multilingual support places Peptipura in a distinct position in the series. Watch items center on limited independent community review volume and the need to build Peptipura-branded public documentation record. Protokol X evaluates evidence, not intent. Architecture before conclusions. Questions before answers.

01
Executive Summary
⌄
Operational Heritage — Bridge Research

Peptipura operates as a rebrand of the former Bridge Research vendor operation, providing an operational track record estimated at over one year prior to the Peptipura brand launch. This is a material contextual differentiator: unlike other newer vendors in the series whose domain age equals their operational age, Peptipura's founder carries prior vendor operating experience, established sourcing relationships, and fulfillment history under the Bridge Research identity. The rebrand represents a brand evolution and documentation upgrade, not a cold start. This heritage is incorporated into the operational maturity assessment throughout this brief.

Who They Are
Peptipura is a US-based, founder-operated research compound vendor run by Angela, based in San Francisco (415 area code confirmed via contact page). The brand was built from Angela's direct experience as a frustrated researcher — inconsistent quality, missing documentation, delayed shipments, and disappearing vendors. Peptipura's stated pillars: Quality and Affordability, Clear Third-Party Testing, Accessible COAs, Consistent Clean Labeling, RUO Compliance, Bilingual Support (English and Spanish), Free USPS Priority Mail shipping (often within 12 hours), and Honest Communication. WooCommerce-powered WordPress storefront. Publicly accessible Lab Results page at peptipura.net/coas/. Phone support available: (415) 323-9395.
Primary Strengths
  • Operational heritage — Bridge Research — over one year of vendor operating experience carried through rebrand; not a first-time operation
  • Publicly accessible Lab Results page — peptipura.net/coas/ is open without account login; independent COA review requires no registration barrier
  • Third-party testing stated across catalog — consistent documentation standard applied to all products, not select SKUs
  • Free USPS Priority Mail shipping on all domestic orders — no minimum threshold; strongest included shipping value in the series
  • Often ships within 12 hours — stated fulfillment speed is the fastest declared window in the series
  • Phone support available — (415) 323-9395; real phone number is a rare transparency signal in this vendor category
  • Bilingual support (English and Spanish) — differentiating accessibility feature serving a broader researcher population
  • Complete policy suite — Terms & Conditions, Return Policy, Shipping & Delivery, Privacy Policy all publicly accessible
  • Founder identity fully disclosed — Angela is named, photographed, and accountable; transparent personal accountability uncommon at this vendor scale
  • Curated specialty catalog including SLU-PP-32, SNAP-8, Cagrilintide, KPV — compounds not universally available
  • Active social presence: Facebook, Twitter/X, YouTube, Instagram, Pinterest
  • Return policy published and accessible — rare in the RUO vendor category
Notable Limitations
  • Limited independent Peptipura-branded community review volume — brand is newer even if the operator is not; public review record under Peptipura name is still building
  • Bridge Research operational history is not independently documented in publicly searchable community platforms under that name at time of brief — heritage is known through Protokol X context, not widely verified in public record
  • Testing methodology specifics (which lab, which methods, endotoxin inclusion) not confirmed in available public data — Lab Results page requires review for methodology detail
  • Boutique catalog — curated selection rather than broad coverage; researchers needing specific compounds not in Peptipura's range must supplement
Best Fit Audience
Researchers who value direct founder accountability and communication above all else. Spanish-speaking researchers who need bilingual support. Price-conscious researchers who want free Priority Mail shipping with no minimum. Those sourcing specialty compounds (SLU-PP-32, SNAP-8, Cagrilintide, KPV) not universally available. Researchers who want to call their vendor directly — a real phone number is rare in this category. Protokol X Rank 5, Tier 2 reflects strong boutique positioning with developing public documentation record under the Peptipura brand.
02
Verification Architecture
⌄
Key differentiator in the series: Peptipura's Lab Results page (peptipura.net/coas/) is publicly accessible without requiring account registration — placing it alongside Axon's AxonVerified portal in the "open access" documentation tier, and ahead of Petratide and Ramp which require login for full documentation access.
Testing Commitment
Third-party testing is stated as a core pillar across the full Peptipura catalog — "Clear Third-party Testing" and "Accessible Certificates of Analysis" are explicitly listed in the founder's stated operating standards. COAs are described as available and downloadable from the Lab Results page. The site's Terms & Conditions note: "Certificates of Analysis (CoAs) may be provided for transparency and verification purposes only" — a legally conservative but transparency-forward disclosure.
Lab Results Page
A dedicated Lab Results page exists at peptipura.net/coas/ and is publicly accessible without account login. This is a structural transparency choice — not every vendor in the series provides open COA access without requiring purchase or registration. The depth and completeness of the COA library (which labs, how many products covered, testing methods included) requires direct review of the page, which is accessible without barriers.
Testing Methodology — Open Items
Specific testing lab identity, HPLC confirmation, mass spectrometry inclusion, and endotoxin screening status are not confirmed in the publicly available site text at time of brief. These details require direct review of the COA library. Researchers who prioritize specific testing method confirmation (particularly endotoxin screening, given the Petratide precedent in this series) should review the Lab Results page directly before ordering.
Protokol X 8-Factor Subscores
COA AvailabilityWeight: 20%
8.5
Third-Party Testing DepthWeight: 20%
8.0
03
Transparency & Documentation
⌄
Policy Architecture
Peptipura maintains a complete public policy suite: Terms & Conditions, Return Policy, Shipping & Delivery, Privacy Policy — all publicly accessible without registration. The Terms & Conditions are detailed and legally complete, including WooCommerce transaction terms, RUO acknowledgment at checkout, age confirmation (21+), medical advice disclaimer, and a COA transparency disclosure. This is a more complete policy architecture than most boutique vendors in the series.
Return Policy
A dedicated Return Policy is publicly accessible — rare in the RUO vendor category where most vendors explicitly state no returns due to the nature of research compounds. The existence of a published return policy indicates Peptipura has defined a documented resolution pathway. Specific terms require direct review. The presence of the policy is a transparency signal regardless of the terms within it.
Founder Identity & Accountability
Angela is named, photographed, and personally accountable on the About page — describing her personal frustration with the vendor landscape and the specific standards she built Peptipura to meet. This level of founder identity disclosure is uncommon in this vendor category and functions as a personal accountability signal. A named, photographed founder with a real phone number and email creates a verifiable chain of responsibility that anonymous vendor operations cannot provide.
RUO Compliance Language
Consistent RUO labeling throughout — header banner, footer, checkout acknowledgment, Terms & Conditions, and product-level labeling. No medical advice, dosing guidance, treatment recommendations, or reconstitution instructions are provided — explicitly stated as policy. The compliance posture is intentional and consistent with the documentation-forward brand positioning Angela describes.
Batch VerificationWeight: 15%
8.0
Transparency PracticesWeight: 10%
8.5
04
Customer Experience
⌄
Shipping — Strongest in the Series
Free USPS Priority Mail on all US domestic orders — no minimum order threshold. Stated fulfillment window of often within 12 hours of order placement. This combination — free priority shipping plus sub-12-hour processing — is the most aggressive fulfillment proposition in the Protokol X vendor series. Shipping is domestic US only at time of brief.
Support Infrastructure
Multiple support channels: email (peptipura@gmail.com), phone (415) 323-9395, and live chat widget on-site. A real phone number in a vendor category where most operations are email-only or chat-only is a meaningful accountability differentiator. Angela's stated standard: "If someone places an order, they deserve clarity. If they have a question, they deserve an answer. If there's an issue, they deserve resolution, not avoidance." That's the brand's stated accountability posture — founder-stated, not institutional.
Bilingual Support
English and Spanish support is explicitly listed as a Peptipura operating standard. This expands the researcher audience Peptipura can serve effectively and represents a meaningful accessibility differentiator — no other vendor in the Protokol X series offers bilingual support documentation.
Pricing Position
Value positioning is explicit — "Affordable Research Peptides" is the site tagline. BPC-157 from $25, GHK-Cu at $40, Retatrutide $40–$70, TB-500 $40–$50, KPV $45, Cagrilintide $45, SNAP-8 $35, SLU-PP-32 $55. Pricing is competitive within the series and below the premium tier, consistent with Angela's stated principle of removing "ridiculously high prices" from the equation.
Fulfillment & SupportWeight: 10%
9.0
Consumer AccessibilityWeight: 10%
8.8
05
Operations & Catalog
⌄
Catalog — Curated with Specialty Depth
Recovery  BPC-157 ($25–$35) · TB-500 ($40–$50)

Longevity / Cellular  GHK-Cu ($40)

Metabolic / GLP  Retatrutide ($40–$70) · Cagrilintide ($45) · GLP-T Research Trio (10/20/30mg bundle, $125)

Anti-inflammatory  KPV ($45)

Cognitive / Neurological  Selank ($35)

Specialty  SLU-PP-32 ($55) · SNAP-8 ($35)

Full catalog available at peptipura.net/store/
Specialty Compounds Note
SLU-PP-32 and SNAP-8 are specialty compounds available at a limited number of vendors. SLU-PP-32 (a nuclear receptor agonist studied for metabolic effects) and SNAP-8 (a peptide studied in anti-aging/wrinkle reduction research) represent catalog depth beyond the commodity peptide layer. Cagrilintide, a long-acting amylin analog studied in metabolic research, is also not universally available. These inclusions serve researchers with specific protocol requirements not met by most core-catalog vendors.
Operational Continuity — Bridge Research Heritage
The Bridge Research rebrand means Angela's operational experience in sourcing, fulfillment, supplier relationships, and customer service predates the Peptipura domain. While the Peptipura brand is newer, the operator is not new to the vendor role. Established sourcing relationships, fulfillment infrastructure, and quality assessment processes carry forward through the rebrand — a meaningful continuity signal relative to true cold-start vendors of comparable brand age.
Catalog ConsistencyWeight: 10%
8.0
Operational ReliabilityWeight: 5%
8.2
06
Community & Reputation
⌄
Community Signal — Building Phase
Independent community review volume under the Peptipura brand is in building phase at time of brief. The brand's social footprint spans Facebook, Twitter/X, YouTube, Instagram, and Pinterest — a broader platform presence than most boutique vendors. Active TikTok content noted in available search data. The community is building through content, direct outreach, and Protokol X affiliate partnership rather than through the legacy community platform volume that older vendors carry.
Bridge Research Heritage Signal
Angela's Bridge Research operating history represents community experience that predates the Peptipura brand launch. While the Bridge Research name does not surface prominently in major public peptide community databases at time of brief, the operational experience, supplier relationships, and fulfillment track record that history represents is a real contextual differentiator relative to vendors building for the first time. The rebrand is a brand evolution, not an attempt to shed negative history — no negative Bridge Research community signal has been identified in available data.
Protokol X Affiliation
Peptipura is included in the Protokol X vendor series, vendor trust index scoring, and this Intelligence Brief as a non-affiliate vendor assessment. This brief represents the primary community documentation framework for Peptipura's credentialing at this stage of brand development. The Protokol X context provides a more rigorous evaluation framework than most boutique vendors of comparable brand age have access to.
Reputation Architecture
Peptipura's reputation architecture is currently founder-anchored rather than community-volume-anchored. Angela's personal accountability, published phone number, named identity, and stated operating principles are the primary trust signals available at this stage. That's a different type of reputation evidence than community review volume — it's accountability-based rather than outcome-based. Both matter. At this stage in Peptipura's brand lifecycle, accountability evidence is what is available and what should be weighted.
07
Intelligence Assessment
⌄
Strengths — Evidence-Supported
  • Bridge Research operational heritage — over one year of vendor experience carried through rebrand; sourcing relationships, fulfillment infrastructure, and quality assessment processes are not starting from zero
  • Open COA access without registration — peptipura.net/coas/ is publicly accessible; matches Axon's AxonVerified in the open-access tier; ahead of Petratide, Ramp, and Kraken on this axis
  • Free Priority Mail shipping — no minimum — strongest included shipping value in the series; 12-hour processing window is the fastest declared fulfillment time in the series
  • Real phone number — (415) 323-9395 — verifiable, callable accountability in a category where most vendors are email-only; highest founder accountability signal in the boutique vendor tier
  • Named founder, photographed, personally accountable — Angela's identity is publicly disclosed; the vendor has a face, a name, and a stated personal standard
  • Bilingual support — unique in the series — English and Spanish; no other Protokol X series vendor offers bilingual documentation and support
  • Full published policy suite — Terms, Return Policy, Shipping, Privacy all publicly accessible; return policy specifically is rare in this vendor category
  • Specialty catalog depth — SLU-PP-32, SNAP-8, Cagrilintide, KPV represent compounds not universally available across peer vendors
Watch Items — Continued Monitoring
  • Peptipura-branded community review volume: Independent platform reviews under the Peptipura name are limited at time of brief; the brand is in the community trust-building phase; monitor VialTalk, Trustpilot, and Reddit as volume accumulates
  • Testing methodology specifics: Which lab, which methods, whether endotoxin is included — these should be confirmed directly from the Lab Results page; not confirmed in available site text at time of brief
  • Bridge Research public documentation: The heritage is real and relevant; the public community record under that name is limited in available search data; the operational history is Protokol X-contextual rather than independently widely documented
  • Catalog breadth: Curated selection suits specific protocol needs; researchers requiring broad compound access will need to supplement with other series vendors
Confidence Level
 High — Founder Accountability Anchored
Confidence is High — driven by the operational heritage of the Bridge Research rebrand, founder identity transparency, open COA access, complete policy architecture, and a real phone number that places accountability at an unusually concrete level for a boutique operation. Not Very High due to limited independent Peptipura-branded community review volume and unconfirmed testing methodology specifics at time of brief.

Protokol X Assessment
Peptipura occupies a distinct position in the Protokol X series — the accountability-forward boutique. The combination of a named founder with a real phone number, open COA access, free Priority Mail shipping with 12-hour processing, bilingual support, and a published return policy represents a transparency and accessibility package that is genuinely differentiated, not assembled from vendor category defaults.

The Bridge Research heritage is a meaningful contextual modifier. Angela is not building her first vendor operation with Peptipura — she is rebranding an operation that already has sourcing relationships, fulfillment experience, and an operational track record. That matters for confidence calibration. The Peptipura brand may be relatively new; the operator is not.

The watch items are calibration notes rather than red flags. Peptipura-branded community review volume is limited because the brand is in its early public phase — not because the operator has a negative record. Testing methodology specifics should be confirmed by reviewing the Lab Results page directly. These are standard due diligence steps for a boutique vendor, not evidence-based concerns.

Where Peptipura stands out most is founder accountability. A real name, a real photo, a real phone number, and a personal statement of operating standards that explicitly addresses the failures she experienced as a researcher — that's a different accountability architecture than institutional vendor documentation. It's personal, verifiable, and callable.

Protokol X assessment: Rank 5, Tier 2. Recommended. Strongest accountability posture in the boutique tier. Bridge Research heritage provides meaningful operational continuity. Community documentation record under the Peptipura brand is the primary development area to monitor.

For research purposes only. Not for human or animal use. Not FDA-approved.
Bottom Line

"No vendor should be trusted because they make claims. Vendors earn confidence through evidence, transparency, verification architecture, and consistency over time. The goal is not certainty. The goal is reducing uncertainty."

Protokol X  ·  Vendor Intelligence Series
Clarity Over Noise. Assess. Decide. Execute.
Disclosure: Peptipura is not presented as a Protokol X affiliate partner in this brief. Vendor Trust Index scores are applied independently of commercial relationships. All content is for informational purposes only. Not medical advice. Not FDA-approved. For research use only.
